title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Madras - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Madras - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Madras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Madras:
IIT Madras is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Madras!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
